theme: 一排咖啡滤杯和分享壶，为什么咖啡杯之后真正让人上瘾的是“手冲台秩序”

items.source: 01_晨光里排开的滤杯架和分享壶.png
items.title: 晨光里排开的滤杯架和分享壶
items.description: 真正让人开始上瘾的，往往不是那只杯子，而是早晨台面上已经自动排好的秩序。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, pour-over coffee station in soft morning light, dripper rack lined neatly beside server carafes on a calm countertop, tactile ceramic and glass textures, save-worthy Xiaohongshu lifestyle realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_电子秤上等待第一滴水的滤杯.png
items.title: 电子秤上等待第一滴水的滤杯
items.description: 开始冲之前那几秒的安静等待，比喝到咖啡本身更像一种日常仪式。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a single pour-over dripper poised on a digital scale just before bloom, kettle nearby, restrained coffee ritual tension, realistic home barista scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_磨豆机旁被刷净的木柄磨豆刷.png
items.title: 磨豆机旁被刷净的木柄磨豆刷
items.description: 会让人反复存图的，不是大机器，而是这些被认真对待的小工具和收尾动作。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, clean wooden coffee grinder brush resting beside a hand grinder and scattered beans, close-up tactile material study, warm editorial lifestyle mood, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_亚麻台布上的分享壶和两只空杯.png
items.title: 亚麻台布上的分享壶和两只空杯
items.description: 分享壶和空杯摆好时，手冲就从一个人的偏好变成了关系里的待客秩序。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, glass coffee server and two empty cups arranged on a linen cloth, quiet hospitality scene, refined but realistic home coffee aesthetic, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_水壶细口在滤纸上方停住的一瞬.png
items.title: 水壶细口在滤纸上方停住的一瞬
items.description: 细口壶悬在滤纸上方的那一刻，整个早晨像被专门慢下来了一秒。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, gooseneck kettle hovering above a paper filter moments before pouring, concentrated hand movement, minimalist hand-brew setup, cinematic realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_咖啡馆后吧台成排晾着的滤杯.png
items.title: 咖啡馆后吧台成排晾着的滤杯
items.description: 一排洗净晾干的滤杯，比菜单更能暴露这家店真正迷恋的细节等级。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, rows of freshly washed drippers drying behind a cafe back bar, stainless rack, soft afternoon work light, documentary coffee profession realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_豆罐标签被收走后的无字工作台.png
items.title: 豆罐标签被收走后的无字工作台
items.description: 没有品牌和文字之后，留下来的反而是最迷人的材料秩序和手感判断。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, wordless coffee workstation with unlabeled bean jars, drippers, server, scale and folded cloth, clean composition focused on tactile order, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_朋友来之前最后一次校准的电子秤.png
items.title: 朋友来之前最后一次校准的电子秤
items.description: 很多人迷恋手冲，其实迷恋的是在别人到来前把一切调到刚刚好的控制感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, digital scale being calibrated before guests arrive, server and dripper waiting nearby, intimate hosting ritual, realistic modern apartment scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_窗边木架上不同材质的滤杯队列.png
items.title: 窗边木架上不同材质的滤杯队列
items.description: 陶瓷、玻璃、金属排在一起时，这套器具像一场关于自我品味的安静陈列。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, lineup of ceramic, glass, and metal drippers on a wooden shelf by a window, natural daylight, collector-like material contrast, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_夜里收工后只剩热水壶余温的手冲台.png
items.title: 夜里收工后只剩热水壶余温的手冲台
items.description: 到了夜里，手冲台留下来的那点余温，会让生活方式本身看起来比咖啡更上头。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, late-night pour-over station after cleanup, warm kettle glow, empty server, quiet residual heat and reflective mood, realistic domestic stillness, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_旅行箱里专门留给滤杯和分享壶的位置.png
items.title: 旅行箱里专门留给滤杯和分享壶的位置
items.description: 当滤杯和分享壶也被认真打包时，这已经不是喝咖啡，而是一整套身份习惯。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, suitcase compartment carefully packed with a dripper, server, folded filters and brewing tools, lifestyle identity projection, realistic travel prep scene, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_收纳抽屉里按顺序排好的滤纸和量豆勺.png
items.title: 收纳抽屉里按顺序排好的滤纸和量豆勺
items.description: 最让人着迷的不是成品咖啡，而是抽屉一拉开就能看到的那种日常自我管理。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, storage drawer arranged with stacked coffee filters, scoops, cloths and small brewing tools in perfect order, tactile close-up organization aesthetics, no logos, no readable text.
